ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
abicheck is a Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared
libraries. It detects breaking changes between library versions
using a multi-tier approach: source/header analysis, symbol table
inspection, and debug info extraction.

Key features:
- 85 ChangeKinds across BREAKING / API_BREAK / COMPATIBLE severity tiers
- ABICC-compatible CLI for major abi-compliance-checker workflows
- Policy system: built-in profiles + YAML-based per-project overrides
- COMPATIBLE_WITH_RISK verdict for deployment-risk changes
- Reports: Markdown, JSON, SARIF, HTML
- Cross-platform metadata support: ELF, PE/COFF, and Mach-O
about.summary: Modern Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared libraries

about.description:
abicheck is a Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared
libraries. It detects breaking changes between library versions
using a multi-tier approach: source/header analysis, symbol table
inspection, and debug info extraction.

Key features:
- 85 ChangeKinds across BREAKING / API_BREAK / COMPATIBLE severity tiers
- ABICC-compatible CLI for major abi-compliance-checker workflows
- Policy system: built-in profiles + YAML-based per-project overrides
- COMPATIBLE_WITH_RISK verdict for deployment-risk changes
- Reports: Markdown, JSON, SARIF, HTML
- Cross-platform metadata support: ELF, PE/COFF, and Mach-O
about.summary: Modern Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared libraries

name: abicheck
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "abicheck" %}
{% set version = "0.2.0" %}
{% set python_min = "3.10" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/napetrov/{{ name }}/archive/refs/tags/v{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 26c3a1f8d2ead35007745f49714dc793e6cad18fb96468b2a5130c1a957dff8e

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - setuptools >=68
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - click >=8.0
    - pyyaml >=6.0
    - defusedxml >=0.7.1
    - pyelftools >=0.29
    - packaging >=21.0
    - pefile >=2023.2.7
    - macholib >=1.16
    - castxml >=0.6.3  # required for header/type analysis mode

test:
  imports:
    - abicheck
  commands:
    - abicheck --help
    - abicheck --version
    - abicheck compare --help
    - abicheck compare-release --help
    - abicheck compat --help
    - abicheck appcompat --help
    - python -c "import abicheck.cli, abicheck.service, abicheck.reporter"
  requires:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}

about:
  home: https://github.com/napetrov/abicheck
  summary: Modern Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared libraries
  description: |
    abicheck is a Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared
    libraries. It detects breaking changes between library versions
    using a multi-tier approach: source/header analysis, symbol table
    inspection, and debug info extraction.

    Key features:
    - 85 ChangeKinds across BREAKING / API_BREAK / COMPATIBLE severity tiers
    - ABICC-compatible CLI for major abi-compliance-checker workflows
    - Policy system: built-in profiles + YAML-based per-project overrides
    - COMPATIBLE_WITH_RISK verdict for deployment-risk changes
    - Reports: Markdown, JSON, SARIF, HTML
    - Cross-platform metadata support: ELF, PE/COFF, and Mach-O
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  doc_url: https://github.com/napetrov/abicheck/tree/main/docs
  dev_url: https://github.com/napetrov/abicheck

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - napetrov
